summary: Iteration 8 testing complete: All 4 new features (ExpiringSubscriptions, SixWeeksChallenge, KPICourses, KPIClient) are working correctly. Backend 22/22 tests passed. Frontend all pages verified and functional.

minor.issue: Requires challenge_id in body despite being in URL path - potential API design improvement

issues: Many members show 'Expiré' status (expired) - this is expected for demo data with dates in the past

critical_code_review_comments: ChallengeParticipantCreate model requires challenge_id in body even though it's in the URL path - this is redundant but functional
Renew endpoint returns {member: {...}, message: ...} rather than the member directly - test was updated to handle this
All 4 pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Seed data creates 10 members, 4 instructors, 8 courses, 1 challenge with 5 participants
seed_data_creation: Existing seed data verified: 10 members, 1 challenge with 5 participants, 8 courses for Dec 2024, 4 instructors
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features tested and working: (1) MembersPage at /members - displays 10 members with subscription dates, expiration status, renewal modal, CRUD operations. (2) ChallengePage at /challenge - shows Challenge Hiver 2024 with 5 participants, weekly check-in tracking (S1-S6), progression stats. (3) CoursesPage at /courses - 8 courses for Dec 2024 with weekly attendance inputs (S1-S4), attendance rate calculation, day summary. (4) ClientKPIPage at /clients - member engagement tracking with Excellent/Bon/Moyen/Faible levels, weekly training chart, per-member stats. Navigation in sidebar works correctly. Test credentials: test@crossfit.ch / test123.
